ideation: This sequence depicts a person gesturing OK with both hands framing the face. The animation will start with the arms at rest, then move to a position where both hands gently cup the face, and finally return to the resting position. This conveys a sense of reassurance and agreement. The motion is slow and deliberate, emphasizing the calm and comforting nature of the gesture. In the first frame, both arms are at the sides, relaxed. In the second frame, the arms move upward, framing the face. The palms face inward, gently cupping the face. In the third frame, the arms remain in place for a moment, holding the pose. The fourth frame shows the arms slowly lowering. In the fifth frame, the arms are back in the resting position.

frames.beat: arms hang at rest, ready to reassure
both hands rise to gently frame the face
holding the comforting gesture, a moment of calm
arms slowly lower, the reassurance complete
both arms return to a relaxed, resting state
